BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: This is an org configuration risk; exploitation assumes access within the Salesforce admin/control plane context.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: Risk arises directly from excess privileged accounts; no complex exploitation conditions.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: The harmful capability is tied to high-privileged accounts (System Administrator profile).

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: No user interaction needed once an admin account is abused/compromised.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Impact remains within the same org boundary.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Admin access can expose all data in the org.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Admin access can modify configuration and data broadly.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: Availability impact is not the primary concern for this control.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Misuse scenarios are easy to demonstrate (e.g., compromised admin account impact).

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Standard remediation is to reduce admins and apply least-privilege profiles/delegated admin.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: Rule directly counts privileged users; high confidence.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Same; tied to internal org administration context.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Risk arises directly from excess privileged accounts.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The harmful capability is tied to high-privileged accounts.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No user interaction needed once an admin account is abused/compromised.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Impact remains within the same org boundary.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Admin access can expose all data in the org.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Admin access can modify configuration and data broadly.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability impact is not the primary concern for this control.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Admin access exposes all sensitive data.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Admin misuse can change critical config/data.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability not primary for this issue.
